title: [Cobblemon] Animated Pokemon
description: Adds custom remodels and animations/custom moves to pokemon!
body:
## **Animated Pokemon adds animations/custom moves to pokemon without, made by FahedE11**

### For any questions, suggestions or problems join the discord server!

### _This addon is for 1.7 or above!_
### 
### This pack includes **ground movement**, **walking,** **idle, battle idle, (air), faint, physical attacks, and some signature/custom moves,** bringing agility and flair to every battle.
### 
### 
### Every animation is **smooth** and **responsive**, perfectly capturing every **pokemon's curious nature** and **fearless fighting style**. Trainers will love seeing each move in action, making **battles feel fast**, **dynamic**, and **full of energy**.

# Don't miss on any sneak-peaks!

# [Click For Discord!](https://discord.gg/EjtGWS2J6M)

## The Added Animations:

<details>
<summary>Click For Added Pokemon</summary>

### - Hawlucha
### - Galarian Farfetch'd
### - Noibat
### - Eevee
### - Remodeled Greninja
### - Mudkip
### - Torchic
### - Treecko
### - Grovyle
### - Sceptile
### - Pikachu (irontail)
### - Gengar
### - Haunter
### - Rowlet
### - Dartrix
### - Mew
### - Hawlucha + (Cosmetic wool)
### - Bunnelby
### - Remodeled Ash Greninja **(REQUIRES MEGA SHOWDOWN)**
### - Goodra
### - Remodeled Talonflame
### - Remodeled Chespin
### - Remodeled Pidgey

</details>

## How to install:
<details>
<summary>Click for instructions!</summary>

- **Put the .zip in `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks`**  
- **Enable in game `ESC - Options - Resource Packs`** 
- **Put the .zip in `/resourcepacks`**
</details>

**The Greninja models are fully recreated from heavininvoid (full credit to him),**

**(ALL OF THE POKEMON MODELS ARE NOT MADE BY ME, ARE BY THE OFFICIAL COBBLEMON MODELERS!)**

# **For Ash Greninja You'll Need Mega Showdown**
# 
# **[Mega Showdown Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)**
